---
name: Knowledge Gap or Drift
about: Report a missing answer, stale page, or graph drift that should be reviewed.
title: "[gap] "
labels: ["knowledge-gap"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

- What question could not be answered cleanly?
- Which page seems missing, stale, or misleading?

## Current path taken

- Pages consulted:
  - `wiki/hot.md`
  - `wiki/domains/...`
  - `wiki/syntheses/...`
  - `wiki/sources/...`

## What seems wrong

- [ ] Missing source
- [ ] Missing concept
- [ ] Missing synthesis
- [ ] Possible stale page
- [ ] Domain boundary is unclear
- [ ] Report layer needs an update

## Suggested next action

- What is the smallest change that would make the graph more useful?
